dashboard.cannotCreateMore: You cannot create any more interviews unless you upgrade
dashboard.upgradeLimitMessage: You have reached your limit for the free trial. Please upgrade to pro to continue using our features.
dashboard.contactUpgrade: Contact founders@folo-up.co to upgrade your plan.

interview.startFailed: Failed to start interview, please try again
interview.endCallConfirm: This action cannot be undone. This action will end the call.
interview.volumeNote: Ensure your volume is up and grant microphone and camera access when prompted. Additionally, please make sure you are in a quiet environment. Please try to speak in standard Mandarin.
interview.tabSwitchNote: Note: Tab switching will be recorded.
interview.thankYouParticipate: Thank you for taking the time to participate in this interview
interview.thankYouConsidering: Thank you very much for considering.
interview.closeTab: You can close this tab now.
interview.alreadyResponded: You have already responded in this interview or you are not eligible to respond. Thank you!
interview.invalidUrlMessage: The interview link you're trying to access is invalid. Please check the URL and try again.
interview.unavailableMessage: We are not currently accepting responses. Please contact the sender for more information.
interview.usePc: Please use a PC to respond to the interview. Apologies for any inconvenience caused.
interview.linkCopied: The link to your interview has been copied to your clipboard.
interview.anonymousQuestion: Do you prefer the interviewees' responses to be anonymous?
interview.anonymousNote: Note: If not anonymous, the interviewee's email and name will be collected.
interview.deleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this interview.
interview.themeUpdateFailed: Failed to update the theme color.

response.deleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this response.

sharePopup.urlCopied: The link to your interview has been copied to your clipboard.
sharePopup.embedCopied: The embed HTML code for your interview has been copied to your clipboard.

lisa.name: Explorer Lisa
lisa.description: Hi! I'm Lisa, an enthusiastic and empathetic interviewer who loves to explore. With a perfect balance of empathy and rapport, I delve deep into conversations while maintaining a steady pace. Let's embark on this journey together and uncover meaningful insights!

bob.name: Empathetic Bob
bob.description: Hi! I'm Bob, your go-to empathetic interviewer. I excel at understanding and connecting with people on a deeper level, ensuring every conversation is insightful and meaningful. With a focus on empathy, I'm here to listen and learn from you. Let's create a genuine connection!

statusUpdateFailed: Failed to update the interview status.
